name: Lubelogger
description: Lubelogger is a self-hosted vehicle maintenance and fuel mileage tracker. Log repairs, maintenance, fuel purchases, and expenses for multiple vehicles. Generate reports, track costs, and keep your vehicle history organized with a clean web interface.

paths.name: App Data
paths.description: Lubelogger configuration, database, and uploaded attachments.

variables.name: Authentication
variables.description: Enable login authentication. Set to false only for local/testing use.

variables.name: Admin Username
variables.description: Default admin username for initial login.

variables.name: Admin Password
variables.description: Default admin password for initial login. Change immediately after first login!

variables.name: SMTP Host
variables.description: SMTP server host for email notifications (optional). Leave empty to disable email.

variables.name: SMTP Port
variables.description: SMTP server port for email notifications.

variables.name: Log Level
variables.description: Logging level (Verbose, Debug, Information, Warning, Error).
